title: Febreze Bathroom Air Freshener, Odour Fighter, Cotton Fresh, 8 Items, Bathrooms Freshener & Odour Eliminator
features: 1. FIGHTS ODOURS: Febreze bathroom air freshener, a top-notch air freshener diffuser, fights odours and leaves a light fresh scent, acting as an effective odour fighter.
2. PREVENTS LINGERING ODOURS: This bathroom air freshener helps prevent odours from lingering, making it an ideal choice for air fresheners for home and specifically air fresheners for bathroom.
3. LONG-LASTING FRESHNESS: Enjoy long-lasting freshness for up to 50 days with Febreze air fresheners, a perfect addition to your cleaning products.
4. EASY TO USE: With its 1 push button activation, this bathroom air freshener is easy to use, requiring no battery or electricity.

5. STYLISH AND DISCREET: The Cotton Fresh fragrance of this gel air freshener is inspired by the freshness of pure white cotton, making it a discreet and stylish toilet air freshener and room air freshener.
description: Product Description Febreze Bathroom air freshener fights odours from the air and also prevents them from lingering on soft surfaces such as towels, bath mats and shower curtains, for up to 50 days. It contains Odourclear technology, various perfume molecules that easily bind to a broad range of bad odour molecules. Once connected, they react to become a new molecule, forcing them to change their stinky ways. Odour convertors are especially efficient for long-term use, so your bathroom is always guest-ready. With no electricity or batteries required, Febreze Bathroom is convenient and easy to use, available in a variety of scents. Ingredients perfume Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP See more
